purpose: Per-leg friction multiplier implementation; corrected predictivity story (insulation artifact); mesh GCI self-generation de-risk.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin 1D model; Salt 2 Jin OF13 mesh refinement de-risk on a clone.

key_findings.corrected_predictivity: Earlier '+27% closures help mdot' was artifact of 60K thermal offset. At CFD-matched T: default -27%, per-leg -49% (Salt 2). mdot is condition-dependent; per-segment dP is robust.
key_findings.dominant_lever: Thermal boundary (effective insulation) >> closures for mdot prediction.
key_findings.factor_2_open: Factor-2 mdot gap at matched T with CFD friction. No validated mechanism. 'Drive too weak' DISPROVEN.
key_findings.mesh_gci_blocker: refineMesh geometrically correct but NCC interface breaks OF13 fvMeshStitcher at runtime. Fix: conformal-first remesh.

limitations: All CFD on coarse mesh (no GCI bound).
T2 insulation runs advancing ~22 s/hr vs 25000 s needed — will not reach steady.
